baseline: Quality animation, DJ, and music for flawless events!

services.label: 01 / THE BEST MUSIC, WELL MIXED
services.title: DJ PERFORMANCE
services.subtitle: DJ BOOKING & ARTISTIC DIRECTION
services.p1: GROOVE CAVIAR accompanies your projects in music and offers professional DJs for all types of private or public events. We are here to meet your needs by bringing our expertise to the musical animation of your events or venues.
services.p2: Based in Biarritz, we operate throughout Aquitaine (Basque Country, Landes, Gironde, Béarn...) and beyond to offer a unique musical signature to your events.
services.p3_text: Our eclectic musical culture (Pop, Soul, Funk, Disco, House, Hip-hop, Electro...) allows us to build tailor-made sets. Our difference lies in reading the crowd: we adapt the energy in real time.
